# B2C Starter Pack

**Business model:** Business-to-Consumer — revenue generated by selling products or services directly to individual consumers. Purchase decisions are driven by a blend of emotional resonance and rational evaluation, with brand voice, social proof, and lifestyle fit as primary trust mechanics.
**Primary marketing challenges:**
- Brand differentiation in crowded consumer markets: most categories have abundant alternatives at similar price points — voice and identity drive preference
- Purchase hesitation: consumers overchoose and abandon carts, wishlists, and intent before converting
- Low repeat purchase: converting first-time buyers to loyal customers who advocate and return requires a relationship beyond the transaction

**Disciplines covered:** Paid_Media · Content_SEO · Lifecycle_Email · Social · Landing_Pages

## When to use this pack
Use for DTC brands, consumer apps, subscription boxes, retail, health and wellness, beauty, lifestyle, and any brand where the primary buyer is an individual consumer. Signals: revenue driven by individual purchases (not business accounts), brand identity is a primary trust driver, Meta/Instagram/TikTok are core acquisition channels.

Note: If the primary goal is transaction conversion mechanics (cart optimization, product listings, abandon recovery), the Ecommerce pack may be a more specific fit. B2C is the broader model covering brand relationship and consumer engagement beyond just the purchase transaction.

## Pack contents
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Paid_Media/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and UGC-style paid creative |
| Content_SEO/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for lifestyle content, buyer guides, and consumer search intent |
| Lifecycle_Email/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for welcome series, behavioral triggers, and loyalty sequences |
| Social/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for organic social, UGC amplification, and community engagement |
| Landing_Pages/PROMPTS.md | Starter prompts for product pages, collection pages, and brand story pages |
